description_long: This object is a Sony PlayStation DualSense wireless controller, primarily used for gaming consoles. It features a sleek, ergonomic design with a predominantly white body and black accents on the triggers and analog sticks. The front face includes a touchpad, two analog sticks, a D-pad, and the iconic PlayStation symbol buttons (triangle, circle, cross, square), as well as a central PlayStation button. The top side houses two pairs of shoulder buttons (L1, R1, L2, R2) and a light bar. The back is smooth and contoured for comfortable grip, with subtle branding. The controller is constructed mainly from hard plastic, with rubberized sections for grip and internal electronic components.
description: A white and black Sony PlayStation DualSense wireless controller with ergonomic grips, analog sticks, and multiple buttons for gaming input.
description_view_0: The rear view shows the smooth, contoured back of the controller with visible shoulder buttons and subtle Sony branding.
description_view_1: This angled side view highlights the curved grip, the raised shoulder buttons, and the top edge of the controller.
description_view_2: The front view displays the touchpad, analog sticks, D-pad, PlayStation symbol buttons, and the central PlayStation button.
description_view_3: The opposite angled side view again emphasizes the ergonomic grip and the arrangement of the shoulder buttons.
